# liff Provider

The LIFF provider manages LINE LIFF (LINE Front-end Framework) applications.

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "liff" {
  # Option 1: Use channel_id + channel_secret (recommended)
  # channel_id     = var.line_channel_id
  # channel_secret = var.line_channel_secret

  # Option 2: Use channel_access_token directly
  # channel_access_token = var.line_channel_access_token
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `channel_access_token` (String, Sensitive) Channel Access Token. Takes precedence over channel_id/channel_secret. Can also be set via `LIFF_CHANNEL_ACCESS_TOKEN` environment variable.
- `channel_id` (String) LINE Login Channel ID. Can also be set via `LIFF_CHANNEL_ID` environment variable.
- `channel_secret` (String, Sensitive) LINE Login Channel Secret. Can also be set via `LIFF_CHANNEL_SECRET` environment variable.
